title: isatis tinctoria subsp. oblongata
intro: Isatis tinctoria subsp. oblongata, also known as the Chinese woad, is a subspecies of the Isatis tinctoria plant, a flowering plant native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. The health benefits of Isatis tinctoria subsp. oblongata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Isatis tinctoria subsp. oblongata is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
